human_decisions.title: Complete Google Calendar OAuth consent in browser
human_decisions.impact: Unblocks calendar booking proof in live flow
human_decisions.required_action: OAuth callback code and env vars are fixed (PR #94). Open /auth/google/url in browser, complete consent, confirm calendar event creation works.

human_decisions.title: Send real SMS from personal phone to verify live flow
human_decisions.impact: Confirms the full pipeline works from an external caller's perspective
human_decisions.required_action: Send SMS from personal phone to +13257523890 and confirm AI reply. Call +13257523890 and let it ring to test missed-call trigger.

blocked_backlog.title: Google OAuth browser consent (code fixed, needs human click-through)

recent_movements.title: Pipeline failure alerting — alerts table, owner SMS, admin endpoints, dead-letter capture
recent_movements.impact: Pipeline failures now create persistent alerts, notify tenant owners via SMS, and surface in admin dashboard. Dead-letter jobs captured when BullMQ retries exhausted.

recent_movements.title: Tenant health monitoring — per-tenant health dashboard
recent_movements.impact: Operators see conversation volume, booking success rates, pipeline reliability, calendar health, and last activity timestamps per tenant. Stage 5 complete.

recent_movements.title: Pilot tenant readiness check for live-test validation
recent_movements.impact: Operator can now see exactly what's missing before running a real missed-call/SMS test on any tenant. 9 checks in live-path order with ready/not_ready verdict.

recent_movements.title: Live environment hardening: startup env validation, shutdown timeout, safe webhook enqueue
recent_movements.impact: Service fails fast on missing config in production. Webhooks always return 200 to Twilio even if Redis is down. Shutdown completes within 30s.

recent_movements.title: Twilio voice webhook for call forwarding and missed-call detection
recent_movements.impact: Incoming calls forwarded to shop phone with 20s timeout. Missed calls trigger SMS pipeline via voice-status callback.

recent_movements.title: Pilot-shop configurable messaging and AI settings
recent_movements.impact: Per-tenant SMS template, AI system prompt, business hours, services. Admin Settings tab. Migration 014.

recent_movements.title: Test/demo tenants excluded from admin dashboards
recent_movements.impact: Admin metrics and tenant lists no longer polluted by test data.

recent_movements.title: Full SMS pipeline verified in production
recent_movements.impact: Webhook → AI → booking → calendar → SMS reply confirmed working. Twilio production wiring complete.

recent_movements.title: Booking pipeline fixed and verified
recent_movements.impact: Date parsing to ISO 8601, name extraction, error propagation. Google Calendar event created in production.

recent_movements.title: Production admin auth fully fixed
recent_movements.impact: Email login, Google OAuth callback, admin bootstrap all working in production.
